---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new Srednoff OS skill or agent profile
title: "[Skill]: "
labels: enhancement, skill
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should this skill help Codex do?

## Domain

Programming, UI/UX, 3D web, SEO/PPC, mobile, security, deployment, docs, automation, or other?

## Trigger

When should Codex use it?

## Expected Output

What should a good result look like?

## Validation

How can we test that the skill works?

## Notes

Do not include secrets, private paths, or private connector state.
